summary: FR-PERS-001 Save Model implementation verified complete (3rd invocation). ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, and persistenceService.ts are fully implemented. All 4 test cases (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) are satisfied. PR opened on feature/13-save-model-persistence for review.

artifacts.name: ActionBar component
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with async handlers, QuotaExceededError handling, auto-dismiss notifications via setNotification

artifacts.name: Notification component
artifacts.description: Success/error overlay with robust error detection via .includes('error'), role=status aria-live=polite for a11y

artifacts.name: persistenceService
artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0 and PersistedModel interface

artifacts.name: persistenceService performance test
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-02: save completes within 500ms for 1000 bricks

artifacts.name: SaveModel behavioral test
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-03: clicking Save shows success notification

recommended_actions: Review the PR for FR-PERS-001 on branch feature/13-save-model-persistence
Verify ActionBar.tsx handleSave uses try/catch with QuotaExceededError detection via .toLowerCase().includes('quota')
Verify Notification.tsx uses .includes('error') for robust error detection (not startsWith)
Verify persistenceService.ts includes schema version 1.0.0 in PersistedModel
Check all 4 test IDs are covered: T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04
Verify data-testid=btn-save is present on Save button
Verify role=status and aria-live=polite on Notification for NFR-A11Y-001
